productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Gold Wedge Sandal
description: A perfect footwear to complement your beautiful feet, these sandals from carlton london are designed to enhance the feminine side of you. Team it with ethnic wear for that unparalleled feminine look.Upper Forefoot strap with tang clasp for enhanced comfort Crystal embellishments for style Midsole PU midsole for durability and comfort Mildly cushioned footbed for added comfort Circular grooves along the toe area of the footbed for acupressure comfort Can finish midsole for style Outsole TPU outsole for durability and comfort Diamond-shaped grooves on forefoot and horizontal grooves on heel for enhanced grip and stability shoe careWipe surface using a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
